problems.yes: Scope compliance: Appropriate inclusion of Parts 1-3 for the Adult dataset and Part 1 for the Wine dataset.
problems.no: Scope compliance for Adult and Wine datasets was required.

problems.yes: Fixed splits and leakage-safe preprocessing: Reported Train/Test/Val split where Preprocessing is reserved to Train only.
problems.no: Expected Train/Test/Val split with preprocessing restricted to Train.

problems.yes: Compute accounting is explicit and comparable: Gradient evals are reported, as are Fevals for RO and Wall Clock Time.
problems.no: Compute accounting should report gradient evals, Fevals, and wall clock time.

problems.yes: Seed protocol and stability reporting is credible: Sufficient random seeds are tested and result dispersion/distribution is well documented.
problems.no: Seed protocol and stability reporting should include multiple seeds and distribution reporting.

problems.yes: Reproducibility instructions are sufficient: Environment setup, commands and fixed seeds are acknowledged.
problems.no: Reproducibility instructions should include environment setup, commands, and fixed seeds.

problems.yes: Single hypothesis with SL Report comparison and theory-grounded expectations.
problems.no: Expected a single testable hypothesis grounded in theory with SL Report comparison.

problems.yes: EDA comparison with SL Report baseline and discussion of differences.
problems.no: Expected comparison between this report's EDA and the SL Report baseline.

C.title: Part 1: Randomized Optimization on Last Layers (both datasets)

problems.yes: Correct RO scope with last 1-3 layers unfrozen and parameter cap disclosed.
problems.no: Expected only last 1-3 layers unfrozen and parameter cap disclosed.

problems.yes: RO objective defined as validation loss and evaluated deterministically.
problems.no: RO objective should be validation loss with deterministic evaluation using model.eval().

problems.yes: Complete operator disclosures for RHC, SA, and GA including policies and perturbation settings.
problems.no: Expected full operator disclosure for RHC, SA, and GA including policies and perturbations.

problems.yes: RO progress curves and budget-matched comparisons provided.
problems.no: Expected progress curves (best-so-far vs fevals) with budget comparisons.

problems.yes: Dataset comparison interpretation provided.
problems.no: Expected dataset-dependent interpretation.

D.title: Part 2: Adam Ablations on the Full Network (Adult dataset only)

problems.yes: All 7 optimizers implemented on Adult dataset with hyperparameters and budgets.
problems.no: Expected all 7 optimizers implemented with declared hyperparameters and budgets.

problems.yes: Time/steps to threshold defined and used consistently.
problems.no: Expected defined validation-loss threshold and reporting of time or steps to reach it.

problems.yes: Sensitivity heatmaps provided with fair budget comparisons.
problems.no: Expected hyperparameter sensitivity heatmaps with interpretation.

problems.yes: Seed stability demonstrated with distribution statistics.
problems.no: Expected seed stability reporting with statistics like median and IQR.

problems.yes: Generalization gap computed and interpreted.
problems.no: Expected computation and interpretation of the generalization gap.

E.title: Part 3: Regularization Study (Standard Adam and Adult Dataset Only)

problems.yes: Adam hyperparameters inherited from best Part 2 results.
problems.no: Adam hyperparameters should be inherited from best Part 2 configuration.

problems.yes: All four regularizers tested with reported values and placement.
problems.no: Expected testing and reporting of all four regularizers.

problems.yes: Budget-matched comparison between baseline and regularized models.
problems.no: Expected budget-matched comparison with seed protocol.

problems.yes: Interpretation comparing Part 2 and Part 3 results.
problems.no: Expected interpretation comparing optimizer ablation vs regularization.

problems.yes: Hypothesis revisited and resolved using evidence.
problems.no: Expected explicit conclusion on hypothesis supported by results.

problems.yes: Practical rule provided for choosing optimization vs regularization strategies.
problems.no: Expected a practical rule for prioritizing optimizer changes vs regularization vs RO tuning.

problems.yes: Visualizations used to support interpretation rather than summary.
problems.no: Expected visualizations to directly support reasoning about optimization behavior.

problems.yes: External peer-reviewed references included.
problems.no: Expected at least two peer-reviewed references.

problems.yes: AI use disclosure provided.
problems.no: Expected AI disclosure statement.

problems.yes: Integrated run using best Adam, regularizer, and RO method.
problems.no: Not applicable

problems.yes: At least three integrated runs across seeds.
problems.no: Not applicable

problems.yes: Integrated runs with compute tradeoff discussion.
problems.no: Not applicable
